nodes.name: Yahoo IMAP Trigger
nodes.notes: Attach your Yahoo IMAP credential in n8n. Use the Yahoo app password, not your normal login password. This workflow is for future incoming alerts after activation.

nodes.name: Normalize Yahoo Alert
nodes.notes: Keep this node small and deterministic. It converts the raw IMAP item into the backend intake contract.

nodes.name: Post Intake to API
nodes.notes: If n8n runs on the same host as the API, change the URL to http://localhost:4000/api/intake/email.
